author: doll-agent
content:
Done. The existing power.rs test surface stayed inside [-10, 10], leaving the float-precision-edge regimes (1e15, 1e-15) uncovered. Added 9 tests covering eval, add, mul, trim, deriv, and huge-cancellation behavior across both extreme magnitudes.

ferray-polynomial: 151 -> 160 tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 71a35099.
